hero.title: Strategic Advisory for Public Sector Modernization.
hero.subtitle: Applied Policy Systems LLC ensures that complex government administrative systems achieve absolute statutory fidelity through Independent Verification & Validation (IV&V) and Subject Matter Expert (SME) guidance.

challenge.label: The Implementation Gap
challenge.title: Policy is written in statutes. Systems are built in code. We translate between the two.
challenge.text: Public technology often fails when legislative mandates are lost in translation during software engineering. We bridge this gap by converting complex regulations into deterministic logic and actionable digital infrastructure.
challenge.solution: We ensure that the 'Rules of the System' are a perfect reflection of the 'Rules of the Law'.

infrastructure.label: System Integrity
infrastructure.title: High-Fidelity Architecture.
infrastructure.text: We architect secure frameworks for government agencies to deliver complex services with precision, protecting both the agency budget and the citizen experience.

sandbox.label: Document Intelligence
sandbox.title: Designing for Administrative Clarity
sandbox.text: Modernization is only successful if it works for both the agency and the citizen. Our Document Intelligence demonstrator illustrates this balance—providing residents with immediate feedback on their requirements while ensuring the administration receives data that is 100% compliant with statutory mandates.

manual.label: Methodology
manual.title: Human-Centered Policy Access
manual.text: Policy is only as effective as its accessibility. Our Living Policy Manual demonstrator showcases the 'Rules as Code' methodology—transforming dense legislative text into an intuitive, conversational guide that empowers citizens while providing administrators with a mathematically provable source of truth.

platform.title: Our Services
platform.desc: Deep-dive IV&V and SME advisory for health and human services modernization.

company.title: The Company
company.desc: Our mission, leadership, and empirical research into administrative outcomes.

contact.title: Consultation
contact.desc: Schedule a formal architectural review or statutory mapping workshop.

hero.label: Consultation
hero.title: Start the conversation.
hero.subtitle: Whether you're a government agency looking to modernize or a technology vendor seeking policy alignment, our architectural experts are ready to consult.

ai.title: Consult with our AI Assistant
ai.desc: Our specialized consulting assistant can help triage your needs and provide immediate architectural insights.

cta.title: Ready for a deep dive?
cta.desc: Our team is available for formal architectural reviews, statutory mapping workshops, and modernization strategy sessions.

founder.title: Graham O'Neill, Founder & Principal Consultant
founder.intro: Graham O’Neill is a public sector innovator with over 15 years of experience optimizing complex government systems.
founder.p1: His career is defined by successfully translating legislative mandates into compliant digital infrastructure. From municipal revenue operations to federal advisory roles, Graham has consistently focused on making policy work for the people it is intended to serve by aligning written regulations with operational realities.
founder.p2: Before founding Applied Policy Systems LLC, Graham held senior leadership positions across all levels of government, specializing in the structural evaluation of benefits access and the modernization of tax administration programs.

research.label: Research & Insights
research.title: Insights to improve service delivery and policy fidelity.

expertise.label: Strategic Pillars
expertise.title: A multi-dimensional framework for system integrity.

fidelity.title: Statutory Verification & Fidelity
fidelity.desc: Independent verification frameworks that ensure complex administrative systems remain strictly aligned with the written law.

isolation.title: Jurisdictional Isolation Architecture
isolation.desc: Absolute data sovereignty for complex federal/state hierarchies, ensuring localized operations never compromise the global security baseline.

security.name: Fail-Closed Security
security.detail: Defaults to strict federal privacy baselines, ensuring compliance prior to localized configuration.

environments.name: Isolated Environments
environments.detail: Geographic boundaries act as secure, isolated vaults for administrative rule application.

audit.name: Immutable Audit Trails
audit.detail: Every system action is logged with strict jurisdictional context for transparent federal oversight.

math.title: Mathematical Policy Verification
math.desc: Formal logic environment allowing policymakers to mathematically prove that system rules match the written law.

proofs.name: Formal Logic Proofs
proofs.detail: Translates statutes into axioms to prove logic contains no dead-ends or loopholes.

simulation.name: Scenario Simulation
simulation.detail: Simulates policy changes against historical data to project caseload and financial impacts.

prevention.name: Regression Prevention
prevention.detail: Ensures localized waivers do not break the federal compliance baseline for the state.

certification.title: Statutory Certification Hub
certification.desc: Centralized tracking of legislative changes and federal certification requirements (MES/CMS/FNS).

mapping.name: Legislative Mapping
mapping.detail: Maps pending bills directly to the software rules they impact, ensuring synchronous evolution.

readiness.name: Certification Readiness
readiness.detail: Automatically structures system artifacts into the precise formats required for federal funding.

bias.title: Algorithmic Bias Monitoring
bias.desc: Mandatory oversight ensuring system-generated outcomes remain equitable, transparent, and legally defensible.

detection.name: Bias Detection
detection.detail: Continuously monitors outcomes for systemic disparities in location or demographic data.

auditing.name: Logic Tree Auditing
auditing.detail: Logs the exact parameters and logic utilized for every machine-driven determination.

integrity.name: Source Integrity Alerts
integrity.detail: Alerts administrators if external data integrations return anomalous or low-confidence results.

risk.title: Financial Integrity & Risk Mitigation
risk.desc: Precision-engineered modules built to manage strict tolerances and protect agencies from federal sanctions.

qc.title: Enterprise Quality Control (QC)
qc.desc: A unified auditing engine ensuring cross-program eligibility reviews (SNAP/Medicaid) remain strictly compliant.

sampling.name: Intelligent Sampling
sampling.detail: Automatically routes high-risk cases to QC reviewers based on federal guidelines.

diagnostics.name: Root Cause Diagnostics
diagnostics.detail: Determines if errors originated from client omission, caseworker entry, or policy misconfiguration.

feedback.name: Remediation Feedback
feedback.detail: Creates a loop between audit findings and operations to address systemic trends proactively.

per.title: SNAP PER Mitigation Engine
per.desc: Specialized financial compliance for SNAP, managing strict tolerances to prevent federal overpayment sanctions.

scoring.name: Pre-Auth Risk Scoring
scoring.detail: Flags high-variance cases (fluctuating income) for secondary review prior to benefit issuance.

dashboards.name: Tolerance Dashboards
dashboards.detail: Visualizes over/underpayment rates against FNS national thresholds in real-time.

tracking.name: Liability Tracking
tracking.detail: Distinguishes between agency and client errors to generate required Corrective Action Plans.

abawd.title: ABAWD Compliance Management
abawd.desc: Automates the complex 3-in-36 month time-limit tracking, reducing procedural friction for caseworkers and citizens.

exemptions.name: Proactive Exemptions
exemptions.detail: Scans integrated databases to identify statutory exemptions without redundant paperwork.

clock.name: Clock Management
clock.detail: Precisely tracks countable months and geographic waivers across labor market areas.

reporting.name: Activity Reporting
reporting.detail: Simplified mobile interfaces for logging work hours, minimizing procedural drop-offs.

rbac.title: Precision Access Control (RBAC)
rbac.desc: A granular access matrix coordinating work across applicants, caseworkers, and adjudicators with zero data leakage.

workflows.name: Persona-Based Workflows
workflows.detail: Isolates capabilities across distinct roles, from intake staff to administrative law judges.

generation.name: Dynamic UI Generation
generation.detail: Interfaces are generated server-side based on security clearance, preventing unauthorized data exposure.

handoffs.name: Secure Handoffs
handoffs.detail: Routes cases between departments without exposing PII to unauthorized internal personnel.

intelligence.title: Operational Intelligence & Automation
intelligence.desc: Deterministic engines and analytics that translate complex statutes into mathematically provable outcomes.

rac.title: Rules Engine (RaC)
rac.desc: A legally grounded Rules Engine translating legislative text into machine-executable logic using a Rules-as-Code methodology.

renewals.name: Data-Driven Renewals
renewals.detail: Facilitates eligibility reviews via external data integration, removing manual calculation burden while maintaining strict policy adherence.

communications.name: Statutory Communications
communications.detail: Generates required notices (NOMI) based on real-time case status changes, ensuring procedural compliance.

workspace.name: Policy Workspace
workspace.detail: Structured environment for updating program parameters without hardcoded software changes.

burden.title: Administrative Burden Analytics
burden.desc: Quantifies the friction placed on citizens and staff, replacing self-reported metrics with provable data.

calculation.name: Burden Calculation
calculation.detail: Computes exact processing time reductions and drop-off rates following new initiatives.

diagnostics.name: Churn Diagnostics
diagnostics.detail: Isolates applications denied due to paperwork friction rather than statutory ineligibility.

reporting.name: Compliance Reporting
reporting.detail: Aggregates data to satisfy federal mandates regarding administrative hurdle reduction.

gateway.title: Financial Data & Tax Gateway
gateway.desc: Secure integration hub managing complex financial parameters and tax routing to support income verification.

infrastructure.name: E-Filing Infrastructure
infrastructure.detail: Monitored pipeline for secure data transmission adhering to federal tax standards.

parameters.name: Dynamic Parameters
parameters.detail: Allows updates to localized tax rates and deduction thresholds without code changes.

verification.name: Instant Verification
verification.detail: Interfaces with workforce databases to validate income, reducing manual paystub reliance.

api.title: Interoperability API Gateway
api.desc: Comprehensive integration layer designed to prevent vendor lock-in and connect disparate state/federal systems.

sandbox.name: Developer Sandbox
sandbox.detail: Secure access to API documentation and testing environments for internal IT teams.

webhooks.name: Webhook Infrastructure
webhooks.detail: Modern architecture for real-time data synchronization across disparate databases.

cryptography.name: Payload Cryptography
cryptography.detail: Enforces strict security standards on all inbound and outbound API requests.

delivery.title: Service Delivery & Human Capital
delivery.desc: Infrastructure designed to eliminate administrative burden and embed training directly into production.

adjudication.title: Administrative Adjudication
adjudication.desc: Legally robust framework for managing fair hearings and appeals with full historical context for judges.

snapshots.name: Immutable Snapshots
snapshots.detail: Captures the exact household data and rules active at the time of the original denial.

automation.name: Docket Automation
automation.detail: Manages scheduling and noticing to prevent statutory deadlines from being missed.

resolution.name: Pre-Hearing Resolution
resolution.detail: Routes contested cases to senior staff to overturn clear errors before judicial review.

portal.title: Omnichannel Citizen Portal
portal.desc: Mobile-responsive self-service hub diverting traffic from call centers by empowering citizens to manage cases.

hub.name: Unified Case Hub
hub.detail: Secure portal for checking status, reporting changes, and digital document uploads.

communications.name: Communications Engine
communications.detail: Logs all correspondence across mail, email, and SMS for an indisputable audit trail.

navigator.name: Navigator Interfaces
navigator.detail: Specialized displays for community assisters to triage inquiries and troubleshoot cases.

academy.title: Workforce Training Academy
academy.desc: Embeds training directly into the production environment to address staff turnover and policy complexity.

lessons.name: Contextual Lessons
lessons.detail: Delivers role-specific training modules directly within the user's daily workflows.

simulations.name: Sandboxed Simulations
simulations.detail: Allows staff to practice on synthetic cases that mimic the live production system.

tracking.name: Proficiency Tracking
tracking.detail: Dashboards tracking training completion to identify knowledge gaps before errors occur.

enrollment.title: Cross-Enrollment Engine
enrollment.desc: Automatically identifies eligibility overlaps across programs to maximize citizen access to benefits.

matching.name: Program Matching
matching.detail: Scans client index to flag households receiving one benefit that likely qualify for others.

bridging.name: Application Bridging
bridging.detail: Pre-populates secondary applications with verified data to eliminate redundant entry.

analytics.name: Holistic Analytics
analytics.detail: Cross-program dashboards to measure the success of horizontal integration initiatives.

lifecycle.label: The Methodology
lifecycle.title: The Modernization Lifecycle
lifecycle.subtitle: Our four-phase approach to achieving absolute statutory fidelity.

discovery.title: Statutory Discovery
discovery.desc: We deconstruct complex legislative mandates into a library of atomic logical axioms.

mapping.title: Architectural Mapping
mapping.desc: Mapping logical axioms to system requirements to ensure every line of code has a statutory parent.

verification.title: Logic Verification
verification.desc: Rigorous testing of system rules against edge cases and historical data to prove compliance.

certification.title: Continuous Certification
certification.desc: Real-time monitoring and auditing to ensure system integrity as policy and technology evolve.

trusted.label: Trusted Advisory
trusted.title: Official Recommendations to the IRS Commissioner on Digital Infrastructure Standards.

agencies.title: State & Municipal Agencies
agencies.desc: Protecting agency budgets from federal audit penalties through executive policy formulation and rigorous modernization strategy.

vendors.title: GovTech Vendors
vendors.desc: Supplying the exact logical parameters and 'Rules-as-Code' blueprints required to build compliant, auditable public sector software.

coalitions.title: Community Coalitions
coalitions.desc: Designing service delivery models that eliminate documentation barriers and renewal churn for vulnerable populations.

cta.title: Ready to Modernize?
cta.desc: Our modular infrastructure is designed to be deployed incrementally, ensuring zero downtime and immediate statutory compliance.
